parsed.production_notes: The video combines a live-action human actor with an AI-generated robot avatar on a screen. The robot's lip-sync and facial movements are characteristic of AI generation, and the voices sound synthetic.

characters.appearance: Young adult male, slim build, short dark hair. Seen exclusively from behind. Distinguishing mark: 'ME NO ENGLISH' written in large red letters across his upper back.
White humanoid robot face with bright blue eyes. Smooth synthetic skin with visible mechanical joints in the neck area.

scenes.setting: A modern room with a large window overlooking a city skyline during the day. A large vertical monitor is set up in front of the window.

panels.panel_visual_description: A young man sits shirtless, viewed from behind, facing a large vertical monitor. The words 'ME NO ENGLISH' are written in red paint across his upper back. He wears black pants. The monitor displays a close-up of a white, humanoid robot face with bright blue eyes and visible mechanical neck joints. The monitor is positioned in front of a large window offering a view of a modern city skyline with tall glass buildings. A red cloth is draped over the chair the man is sitting on. The lighting is bright and natural, coming from the window.

scenes.visual_description: The human sits facing the screen, interacting with the AI robot. The camera remains static throughout the scene. Various app UI elements, text overlays, and pop-ups appear over the footage as the conversation progresses.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character B says: Hello, what is your name?
Character A says: My name is Rahul.
Character B says: How old are you?
Character A says: I have 22.
Character B says: I have 22 नहीं, I am 22 years old होता है। [Not 'I have 22', it should be 'I am 22 years old'.]
Character A says: Okay okay. I am 22 years old.
Character B says: Where are you from?
Character A says: I am Uttar Pradesh.
Character B says: I am Uttar Pradesh नहीं, I am from Uttar Pradesh होगा। [Not 'I am Uttar Pradesh', it will be 'I am from Uttar Pradesh'.]
Character A says: Oh, ठीक है, ठीक है। मुझे English अच्छे से नहीं आती। [Oh, okay, okay. I don't know English well.]
Character B says: कोई problem नहीं। AI teachers try किया? [No problem. Have you tried AI teachers?]
Character A says: वो तो महंगे होते होंगे ना? [They must be expensive, right?]
Character B says: बिल्कुल नहीं। Normal English classes से 7 गुना सस्ता है, इसलिए 50 लाख लोग MySivi पर English practice कर रहे हैं। [Not at all. It is 7 times cheaper than normal English classes, that's why 5 million people are practicing English on MySivi.]
Character A says: पर time नहीं मिलता। [But I don't get time.]
Character B says: रोज़ की सिर्फ 15-20 minute की practice काफी है। बिल्कुल confident हो जाओगे। [Just 15-20 minutes of daily practice is enough. You will become completely confident.]
Character A says: Wow, कैसे join करूँ? [Wow, how do I join?]
Character B says: ये install का button दबाओ और MySivi app install करो। सिर्फ 15 दिनों में तुम्हें improvement दिखने लगेगी। चलो, शुरू हो जाओ। [Press this install button and install the MySivi app. You will start seeing improvement in just 15 days. Come on, get started.]
